name: Fairies Union
effect: Increase assistant production based on amount of Enchanted Fields, Inns and Blacksmiths if building count is even, or all other buildings if building count is odd.
formula: Even: (6 * x ^ 0.6)%, where x is Enchanted Fields, Inns and Blacksmiths. Odd: (6 * x ^ 0.6)%, where x is T4-T11 Buildings.

name: Elven Union
effect: Increase click production based on Faction Coins found this Reincarnation. Also autoclicks 10 times per second.
formula: (2 * ln(1 + x) ^ 2)%, where x is Faction Coins found this Reincarnation.

name: Angels Union
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration multiplicatively based on Mana produced this Era.
formula: (2.5 * ln(1 + x) ^ 2.5)%, where x is Mana produced this Era.

name: Goblins Union
effect: Multiplicatively increase Faction Coin find chance based on spells cast this Era.
formula: (2.25 * log10(1 + x) ^ 2.25)%, where x is spells cast this Era.

name: Undead Union
effect: Increase the production of Unique Buildings based on Offline production.
formula: (360 * ln(1 + x) ^ 3)%, where x is Offline production.

name: Demons Union
effect: A fraction of Non-Evil spells cast this Era count as Evil. Also Trophies count more based on time spent offline this Reincarnation.
formula: Evil spells: (0.01 * x ^ 0.8), where x is Non-Evil spells cast this Era. Trophies: (30 + 0.3 * x ^ 0.6)%, where x is offline time this Reincarnation.

name: Titans Union
effect: Multiplicatively increase Faction Coin find chance based on time spent this Era. Also increase Maximum Mana additively based on time spent this Era.
formula: FC: (50 * (x / 3600) ^ 0.85)%, Mana: +(20 * x ^ 0.75), where x is time spent this Era.

name: Druids Union
effect: Increase the production of Non-Unique buildings based on total Lineage level and maximum Grand Balance targets.
formula: (x * y ^ 1.25)%, where x is total Lineage levels and y is buildings targeted by Grand Balance (max 11).

name: Faceless Union
effect: Multiplicatively increase assistants based on total time spent as a random faction. Updates every 3 minutes.
formula: (40 + 0.4 * x ^ 0.4), where x is time spent all time with a given faction.

name: Dwarven Union
effect: Effect varies by alignment. Order: Increase all building production based on time spent this Reincarnation. Chaos: Multiplicatively increase assistants based on spells cast this Reincarnation. Balance: Increase Mana Regeneration based on clicks made this Reincarnation.

name: Drow Union
effect: Effect varies by alignment. Order: Increase offline bonus based on Maximum Mana. Chaos: Increase production of a specific building tier based on time spent offline this Reincarnation. Balance: Multiplicatively increase Maximum Mana based on Tax Collections cast this Era.

name: Dragon Union
effect: Effect varies by alignment. Order: Increase the production of all buildings based on time spent as Order this Reincarnation. Chaos: Increase production of Unique or Non-Unique buildings based on assistants owned (target depends on FC chance). Balance: Multiplicatively increase Maximum Mana based on current Lineage level.
formula: Order: (0.7 * x ^ 0.7)%. Chaos Unique: (2 * x ^ 0.3)%, Chaos Non-Unique: (6 * x ^ 0.3)%. Balance: (8 * x ^ 0.8)%.

name: Archon Union
effect: Temporal Flux also increases Maximum Mana based on time spent this Era.
formula: (0.35 * (x / 60) ^ 0.825)%, where x is time spent this Era.

name: Djinn Union
formula: 10% increase to the exponent of Maelstrom formulas.

name: Makers Union
effect: All Creation production effect is based on the highest Mana Regeneration rate this Reincarnation. Does not affect Faction Coin find chance.
